title: Feature test checks
description: Maps test-script IDs to their check definitions. Each top-level key becomes a generated <id>.sh file under test/features/<feature-id>/tests/.

additionalProperties.description: One test script: an ordered list of checks plus optional shell setup/teardown.

description.description: Short human-readable description emitted as a comment at the top of the generated script.

pre.description: Verbatim shell content inserted after sourcing the test library and before any checks (variable assignments, helper function definitions, etc.).

post.description: Shell content run on EXIT via a _cleanup() trap (e.g. dotfile cleanup).

on_failure.description: Shell content for _test_failure_diagnostics(), called by the test library when any check fails.

shell.description: Interpreter for the generated test script shebang (defaults to bash).

title.description: Human-readable label shown in test output.

debug.description: Verbatim shell content emitted unconditionally before this check (diagnostic echo/cat/ls calls). Unused for install_failure checks.

on_fail.description: Verbatim shell content run only when this specific check fails. Unused for install_failure checks.

oneOf.description: Asserts the installer exits non-zero and that install output contains pattern. Validated by the test runner on the install attempt; not emitted into generated .sh scripts.

pattern.description: Substring that must appear in captured install output when expect_install_failure is true.

oneOf.description: A runtime assertion executed inside the test container after install: maps to check / fail_check / checkMultiple.

cmd.description: Command to run. String for check/fail; array of strings for checkMultiple.

kind.description: Assertion function. Defaults to 'check' when omitted.

min.description: Minimum number of commands that must succeed (required when kind=multiple).
